text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during a stroll around the academy, I
come across a crowd of onlookers gathered
around an elegant group of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, McQueen, before I forget about the
massage oil I promised you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It finally arrived from home, so would you come
pick it up from my room later?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Thank you very much. I was looking for a
good product to massage with after training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's important to take good care of your body.
That way, you'll never have anything to regret.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And with the nice fragrance, I believe it'll help
you to relax. It was specially made by a perfumer
I'm acquainted with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's wonderful! Self-care can often become a
little boring, but a lovely fragrance can help
make it a truly therapeutic experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The hair oil I use has an exceptionally wonderful
scent. The hairdresser who visits our home is the
one who prepares it, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My hair turns all frizzy without it! I have no choice
but to toil over its care.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I like how wavy and soft your hair normally is,
Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You think so? I've always wanted silky, straight
hair like yours, Dober. Do you use a special hair
oil?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose. It's what they send to me from
home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you guys! The only scented thing I use is
probably my deodorant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me! Ryan, do you use a specific
brand? I'd like to match with you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow... The Mejiros sure are different. Do you
know any perfumers personally?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Of course I don't. But I buy their conversation.
Whenever Mejiros are near, something sweet
wafts through the air!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just got back from the sale, and wow, it was
packed. I don't smell like sweat, do I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... you're fine. Did you have a good
shopping trip?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and hear this! I saw the hoodie I had my
eyes on for half off, but then I checked out the
size, and...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Squee! Palmer has to be my favorite, though!
She's so easy to get along with!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally! She really stands out when she's
with the other Mejiros. It's so cool!
